test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_strings_{cardinality} ( col1 LowCardinality(String), col2 LowCardinality(String) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY col1
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_strings_{cardinality} SELECT lc AS col1, lc AS col2 FROM ( SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % {cardinality})) AS lc FROM numbers(10000000) )
test.query: SELECT DISTINCT col1 FROM test_strings_{cardinality} FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT col2 FROM test_strings_{cardinality} FORMAT Null
